problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: If Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
